$schema_note: Fixed corpus for the runtime-shrink loop (docs/architecture/runtime-shrink-loop.md, Phase 0). 'Fixed' means a fixed SCENARIO SET + run recipe + stable artifact path — NOT frozen raw trace files. C is read from span attributes, so after source seam annotations land the corpus is REGENERATED from these same scenarios (via scripts/runtime-corpus.sh) so C rises. N (condensation node count) is volume-independent, so short re-captures of the same scenarios reproduce the same N.

baseline.note: Union of the four in_gate scenarios. 31 -> 33 when control-plane-cancel-close was added (tf-hgcd): it legitimately exercises the control-request-dispatcher / RuntimeLifecycleWorkflow nodes the prior corpus never reached. Reproduce with: bash scripts/runtime-corpus.sh check (keys present); the keyless subset reproduces N=25.

scenarios.role: tool-call path (agent tool call -> executor -> workflow engine)
scenarios.note: Non-deterministic leaf timing; topology (N, SCCs) is stable. Env-gated: skipped when OPENAI_API_KEY is unset.
Env-gated: skipped when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset.

scenarios.role: multi-context parent+child (session_new -> child context -> handoff/resume) + control-plane recorder
scenarios.note: Inline jsonLineProgram child agents; no API key. Always runs. Provides the multi-context coverage slot and the control-plane recorder edges.

scenarios.role: control-plane lifecycle cancel + resume-after-cancel + close (agent-tool surface -> RuntimeLifecycleRequest -> dispatcher -> RuntimeLifecycleWorkflow -> terminal evidence)
scenarios.note: Inline jsonLineProgram parent drives a child through session_cancel / session_prompt (resume) / session_close; no API key. Always runs. Exercises the previously under-sampled control-request-dispatcher / runtime-control path (runtime-dynamics-map.md §8).

manual_extended.note: ~146MB raw trace; its own host.ts declares it a manually-run probe, NOT part of the deterministic gate. Run manually for prompt/output coverage: pnpm --filter @firegrid/tiny-firegrid simulate:run acp-tool-elicitation. Do NOT add to the gate (large artifact).

coverage_slots.note: Deterministic; drives cancel + resume-after-cancel + close through the agent-tool surface. Fires control_request.lifecycle.{dispatch,workflow,terminal_evidence} + runtime.lifecycle + control.lifecycle spans.

keyless_subset.note: Deterministic-only subset (no API keys). Runnable in CI without keys; the cancel/close scenario adds the control-request-dispatcher / RuntimeLifecycleWorkflow nodes (23 -> 25 vs delegation alone). Lower than the full gate because the live tool-call/wait paths are absent.
